1540	This function creates an agent with the World and EventQueue from the Core
1541	state, enabling subcall conversations to be visible in the TUI.
1542	-}
1543	runConversation :: Tracer IO Trace -> TuiAgent -> Session -> EventM N TuiState ()
1544	runConversation tracer baseTuiAgent session = do
1545	    config <- use sessionConfig
1546	    convId <- liftIO $ newConversationId
1547	    outChan <- use eventChan
1548	    inChan <- liftIO $ newBChan 100
1549	    let notifyProgress = buildOnProgress convId outChan
1550	    let node = tuiNode baseTuiAgent
1551	    agent0 <- liftIO $ OneShot.nodeToAgent config.sessionStore Nothing convId (contramap OneShotTrace tracer) config.sessionApiKeys node
1552	    agent1 <- liftIO $ agentEvaluateActiveTools (contramap (OneShotTrace . OneShot.mapProgressiveDisclosureTrace) tracer) (osNodeTools node) agent0
1553	    coreRef <- use tuiCore
1554	
1555	    -- Get the World and EventQueue from Core for subcall visibility
1556	    coreState <- liftIO $ readTVarIO coreRef
1557	    let mWorld = coreWorld coreState
1558	    let mEventQueue = coreOSEventQueue coreState
1559	
1560	    let notifyNeedInput = writeBChan outChan (AppEvent_AgentNeedsInput convId)
1561	
1562	    -- Set the World and EventQueue on the agent for subcall visibility
1563	    -- and initialize the call stack with a root entry
1564	    let agentWithOS =
1565	            agent1
1566	                { ctxWorld = mWorld
1567	                , ctxEventQueue = mEventQueue
1568	                , ctxCallStack = [CallStackEntry "root" convId 0]
1569	                }
1570	
1571	    let a =
1572	            agentWithOS
1573	                { step = \sess -> do
1574	                    let waitIfPaused = do
1575	                            core <- readTVarIO coreRef

1470	-- | Add a message to the buffer for a conversation.
1471	addBufferedMessage :: ConversationId -> Core -> Text.Text -> IO ()
1472	addBufferedMessage convId core msg =
1473	    atomically $ modifyTVar core.coreBufferedMessages $ Map.insertWith (\new old -> new ++ old) convId [msg]
1474	
1475	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1476	-- Subcall Conversation Management
1477	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1478	
1479	{- | Create a conversation entry for a sub-agent call.
1480	
1481	This function creates a conversation entry in the TUI that represents a nested
1482	agent invocation. Unlike regular conversations, the execution is handled by
1483	runSubAgentWithEventEmission in OneShotTool.hs, which emits progress events
1484	that update this conversation entry.
1485	
1486	The conversation uses the SAME decoration/naming as regular conversations
1487	to ensure visual consistency in the TUI. The tree branches (└─>, ├─, │)
1488	provide the visual nesting indication, not the conversation name itself.
1489	-}
1490	createSubcallConversationEntry ::
1491	    -- | The agent being invoked as a tool
1492	    TuiAgent ->
1493	    -- | The conversation ID for this subcall (pre-generated)
1494	    ConversationId ->
1495	    -- | Parent conversation ID (the caller)

1359	-- | Check if a conversation is currently paused.
1360	isConversationPaused :: ConversationId -> Core -> Bool

1362	
1363	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1364	-- Queue Management
1365	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1366	
1367	-- | Clear all queued messages for the current conversation.
1368	handleClearQueuedMessages :: EventM N TuiState ()
1369	handleClearQueuedMessages = do
1370	    mConv <- getFocusedConversation
1371	    case mConv of
1372	        Nothing -> showStatus StatusWarning "No conversation selected"
1373	        Just conv -> do
1374	            if conversationStatus conv /= ConversationStatus_Paused
1375	                then showStatus StatusWarning "Can only clear queued messages when paused (Ctrl+E)"
1376	                else do
1377	                    let convId = conversationId conv
1378	                    coreRef <- use tuiCore
1379	                    core <- liftIO $ readTVarIO coreRef
1380	                    liftIO $ atomically $ modifyTVar (coreBufferedMessages core) $ Map.insert convId []

1279	-- | Refresh tools for the given agent.
1280	refreshToolsForAgent :: TuiAgent -> EventM N TuiState ()
1281	refreshToolsForAgent agent = do
1282	    tools <- liftIO $ readTVarIO (osNodeTools $ tuiNode agent)
1283	    tuiUI . uiAgentTools %= updateAgentTools (tuiAgentId agent) tools
1284	  where
1285	    updateAgentTools :: AgentId -> [a] -> [(AgentId, [a])] -> [(AgentId, [a])]
1286	    updateAgentTools aid newTools =
1287	        ((aid, newTools) :) . filter ((/= aid) . fst)
1288	
1289	-- | Handle F5 key: Refresh tools for selected agent.
1290	handleRefreshTools :: EventM N TuiState ()
1291	handleRefreshTools = do
1292	    selected <- use (tuiUI . selectedAgentInfo)
1293	    case selected of
1294	        Just agent -> do
1295	            tools <- liftIO $ readTVarIO (osNodeTools $ tuiNode agent)

1176	-- | Handle heartbeat - refresh UI state and auto-clear expired status messages.
1177	handleHeartbeat :: EventM N TuiState ()
1178	handleHeartbeat = do
1179	    mSelectedConvId <- getFocusedConversationId
1180	    coreRef <- use tuiCore
1181	    coreState <- liftIO $ readTVarIO coreRef
1182	    let convs = coreConversations coreState
1183	
1184	    let sortedConvs = sortConversationsForNesting convs
1185	
1186	    tuiUI . conversationList .= List.list ConversationListWidget (Vector.fromList sortedConvs) 1
1187	
1188	    case mSelectedConvId of
1189	        Just selectedConvId -> do
1190	            let newConvs = Vector.fromList sortedConvs
1191	            case Vector.findIndex (\c -> conversationId c == selectedConvId) newConvs of
1192	                Just idx -> tuiUI . conversationList . listSelectedL .= Just idx
1193	                Nothing -> pure ()
1194	        Nothing -> pure ()
1195	    selectedAgent <- use (tuiUI . selectedAgentInfo)
1196	    case selectedAgent of
1197	        Just agent -> refreshToolsForAgent agent
1198	        Nothing -> pure ()
1199	    buffered <- liftIO $ readTVarIO (coreBufferedMessages coreState)
1200	    tuiUI . uiBufferedMessages .= buffered

1071	-- | Format a session as markdown with the specified order preference.
1072	formatSessionMarkdown :: OrderPreference -> Session -> Text.Text
1073	formatSessionMarkdown orderPref session =
1074	    let opts =
1075	            SessionPrintOptions
1076	                { sessionPrintFile = ""
1077	                , showToolCallResults = ShownFull
1078	                , showToolCallArguments = ShownFull
1079	                , nTurns = Nothing
1080	                , repeatSystemPrompt = False
1081	                , repeatTools = False
1082	                , orderPreference = orderPref
1083	                , noFunnyStamp = True
1084	                }
1085	     in formatSessionAsMarkdown opts session
1086	
1087	-- | Handle Ctrl+p: Dump the currently focused session to a markdown file.
1088	handleDumpSessionToMarkdown :: EventM N TuiState ()
1089	handleDumpSessionToMarkdown = do
1090	    mSession <- getFocusedSession
1091	    mConvId <- getFocusedConversationId
1092	    case (mSession, mConvId) of
1093	        (Just session, Just (ConversationId cid)) -> do
1094	            let markdown = formatSessionMarkdown Chronological session
1095	                fileName = "conv." <> show cid <.> "md"

1000	            mContent <- liftIO detectClipboardContent
1001	            case mContent of
1002	                Nothing -> showStatus StatusWarning "Clipboard is empty or inaccessible"
1003	                Just content -> do
1004	                    action <- liftIO $ analyzeContent content
1005	                    case action of
1006	                        IgnoreContent -> showStatus StatusWarning "No attachable content in clipboard"
1007	                        PasteAsText text -> do
1008	                            editorContents <- use (tuiUI . messageEditor . editContentsL)
1009	                            let newContents = TextZipper.insertMany text editorContents
1010	                            tuiUI . messageEditor . editContentsL .= newContents
1011	                            showStatus StatusInfo "Text pasted from clipboard"
1012	                        AttachAsMedia attachment -> do
1013	                            mConv <- getFocusedConversation
1014	                            case mConv of
1015	                                Nothing -> showStatus StatusError "No conversation selected"
1016	                                Just conv -> do
1017	                                    let convId = conversationId conv
1018	                                    tuiUI . attachedFiles %= Map.insertWith (\new old -> old ++ new) convId [attachment]
1019	                                    let filename = maybe "unnamed" id attachment.mediaFilename
1020	                                    showStatus StatusInfo $ "Attached from clipboard: " <> filename

function.arguments:
{"capability": "write-file-range", "path": "src/System/Agents/TUI/Event.hs", "ranges": "848-870", "content": "-- | Handle session view scrolling.
handleSessionViewEvent :: Tracer IO Trace -> Vty.Event -> KeyMapping -> EventM N TuiState ()
handleSessionViewEvent _tracer ev keymap =
    case ev of
        Vty.EvKey key mods
            | matchesEvent keymap EventEnterTurnNavigation (Vty.EvKey key mods) -> do
                mSession <- getFocusedSession
                case mSession of
                    Just session | not (null session.turns) -> do
                        let navState =
                                TurnNavigationState
                                    { _navSession = session
                                    , _navSelectedTurnIndex = 0
                                    , _navTotalTurns = length session.turns
                                    }
                        tuiUI . turnNavigation .= Just navState
                        showStatus StatusInfo "Navigation mode: Up/Down to navigate, F to fork, Enter/Esc to exit"
                    _ -> showStatus StatusWarning "No session or empty session to navigate"
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KUp _ -> vScrollBy (viewportScroll SessionViewWidget) (-1)
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KDown _ -> vScrollBy (viewportScroll SessionViewWidget) 1
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KLeft _ -> hScrollBy (viewportScroll SessionViewWidget) (-1)
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KRight _ -> hScrollBy (viewportScroll SessionViewWidget) 1
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KPageUp _ -> vScrollPage (viewportScroll SessionViewWidget) Up
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KPageDown _ -> vScrollPage (viewportScroll SessionViewWidget) Down
        _ -> pure ()
"}

function.arguments:
{"capability": "write-file-range", "path": "src/System/Agents/TUI/Event.hs", "ranges": "848-870", "content": "-- | Handle session view scrolling.
handleSessionViewEvent :: Tracer IO Trace -> Vty.Event -> KeyMapping -> EventM N TuiState ()
handleSessionViewEvent _tracer ev keymap =
    case ev of
        Vty.EvKey key mods
            | matchesEvent keymap EventEnterTurnNavigation (Vty.EvKey key mods) -> do
                mSession <- getFocusedSession
                case mSession of
                    Just session | not (null session.turns) -> do
                        let navState =
                                TurnNavigationState
                                    { _navSession = session
                                    , _navSelectedTurnIndex = 0
                                    , _navTotalTurns = length session.turns
                                    }
                        tuiUI . turnNavigation .= Just navState
                        showStatus StatusInfo "Navigation mode: Up/Down to navigate, F to fork, Enter/Esc to exit"
                    _ -> showStatus StatusWarning "No session or empty session to navigate"
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KUp _ -> vScrollBy (viewportScroll SessionViewWidget) (-1)
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KDown _ -> vScrollBy (viewportScroll SessionViewWidget) 1
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KLeft _ -> hScrollBy (viewportScroll SessionViewWidget) (-1)
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KRight _ -> hScrollBy (viewportScroll SessionViewWidget) 1
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KPageUp _ -> vScrollPage (viewportScroll SessionViewWidget) Up
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KPageDown _ -> vScrollPage (viewportScroll SessionViewWidget) Down
        _ -> pure ()
"}

function.arguments:
{"capability": "write-file-range", "path": "src/System/Agents/TUI/Event.hs", "ranges": "790-843", "content": "-- | Check if triple-newline trigger should send the message.
checkTripleNewlineTrigger :: EventM N TuiState ()
checkTripleNewlineTrigger = do
    config <- use sessionConfig
    let inputCfg = sessionInputConfig config
    msgLines <- use (tuiUI . messageEditor . to getEditContents)
    let msgText = Text.unlines msgLines
    when (shouldSendMessage inputCfg msgText) $ do
        -- Strip the trigger suffix before sending
        let cleanedText = stripSendTrigger inputCfg msgText
        tuiUI . messageEditor . editContentsL .= TextZipper.textZipper (Text.lines cleanedText) Nothing
        handleSendMessage

-- | Handle conversation view scrolling and turn navigation.
handleConversationViewEvent :: Tracer IO Trace -> Vty.Event -> KeyMapping -> EventM N TuiState ()
handleConversationViewEvent _tracer ev keymap = do
    mConv <- getFocusedConversation
    hasQueuedMessages <- case mConv of
        Just conv -> do
            buffered <- use (tuiUI . uiBufferedMessages)
            pure $ case Map.lookup (conversationId conv) buffered of
                Just msgs | conversationStatus conv == ConversationStatus_Paused -> not (null msgs)
                _ -> False
        Nothing -> pure False

    case ev of
        Vty.EvKey key mods
            | matchesEvent keymap EventEnterTurnNavigation (Vty.EvKey key mods) -> do
                mSession <- getFocusedSession
                case mSession of
                    Just session | not (null session.turns) -> do
                        let navState =
                                TurnNavigationState
                                    { _navSession = session
                                    , _navSelectedTurnIndex = length session.turns - 1
                                    , _navTotalTurns = length session.turns
                                    }
                        tuiUI . turnNavigation .= Just navState
                        showStatus StatusInfo "Navigation mode: Up/Down to navigate, F to fork, Enter/Esc to exit"
                    _ -> showStatus StatusWarning "No session or empty session to navigate"
        Vty.EvKey key mods
            | hasQueuedMessages && matchesEvent keymap EventNavigateUp (Vty.EvKey key mods) ->
                handleQueueNavigation (-1)
        Vty.EvKey key mods
            | hasQueuedMessages && matchesEvent keymap EventNavigateDown (Vty.EvKey key mods) ->
                handleQueueNavigation 1
        Vty.EvKey key mods
            | hasQueuedMessages && matchesEvent keymap EventDeleteItem (Vty.EvKey key mods) ->
                handleDeleteSelectedMessage
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KUp _ -> vScrollBy (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) (-1)
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KDown _ -> vScrollBy (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) 1
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KLeft _ -> hScrollBy (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) (-1)
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KRight _ -> hScrollBy (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) 1
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KPageUp _ -> vScrollPage (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) Up
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KPageDown _ -> vScrollPage (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) Down
        _ -> pure ()

-- | Handle session view scrolling."}

function.arguments:
{"capability": "write-file-range", "path": "src/System/Agents/TUI/Event.hs", "content": "-- | Check if triple-newline trigger should send the message.
checkTripleNewlineTrigger :: EventM N TuiState ()
checkTripleNewlineTrigger = do
    config <- use sessionConfig
    let inputCfg = sessionInputConfig config
    msgLines <- use (tuiUI . messageEditor . to getEditContents)
    let msgText = Text.unlines msgLines
    when (shouldSendMessage inputCfg msgText) $ do
        -- Strip the trigger suffix before sending
        let cleanedText = stripSendTrigger inputCfg msgText
        tuiUI . messageEditor . editContentsL .= TextZipper.textZipper (Text.lines cleanedText) Nothing
        handleSendMessage

-- | Handle conversation view scrolling and turn navigation.
handleConversationViewEvent :: Tracer IO Trace -> Vty.Event -> KeyMapping -> EventM N TuiState ()
handleConversationViewEvent _tracer ev keymap = do
    mConv <- getFocusedConversation
    hasQueuedMessages <- case mConv of
        Just conv -> do
            buffered <- use (tuiUI . uiBufferedMessages)
            pure $ case Map.lookup (conversationId conv) buffered of
                Just msgs | conversationStatus conv == ConversationStatus_Paused -> not (null msgs)
                _ -> False
        Nothing -> pure False

    case ev of
        Vty.EvKey key mods
            | matchesEvent keymap EventEnterTurnNavigation (Vty.EvKey key mods) -> do
                mSession <- getFocusedSession
                case mSession of
                    Just session | not (null session.turns) -> do
                        let navState =
                                TurnNavigationState
                                    { _navSession = session
                                    , _navSelectedTurnIndex = length session.turns - 1
                                    , _navTotalTurns = length session.turns
                                    }
                        tuiUI . turnNavigation .= Just navState
                        showStatus StatusInfo "Navigation mode: Up/Down to navigate, F to fork, Enter/Esc to exit"
                    _ -> showStatus StatusWarning "No session or empty session to navigate"
        Vty.EvKey key mods
            | hasQueuedMessages && matchesEvent keymap EventNavigateUp (Vty.EvKey key mods) ->
                handleQueueNavigation (-1)
        Vty.EvKey key mods
            | hasQueuedMessages && matchesEvent keymap EventNavigateDown (Vty.EvKey key mods) ->
                handleQueueNavigation 1
        Vty.EvKey key mods
            | hasQueuedMessages && matchesEvent keymap EventDeleteItem (Vty.EvKey key mods) ->
                handleDeleteSelectedMessage
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KUp _ -> vScrollBy (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) (-1)
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KDown _ -> vScrollBy (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) 1
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KLeft _ -> hScrollBy (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) (-1)
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KRight _ -> hScrollBy (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) 1
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KPageUp _ -> vScrollPage (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) Up
        Vty.EvKey Vty.KPageDown _ -> vScrollPage (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) Down
        _ -> pure ()

-- | Handle session view scrolling."}

825	        Vty.EvKey key mods
826	            | hasQueuedMessages && matchesEvent keymap EventNavigateUp (Vty.EvKey key mods) ->
827	                handleQueueNavigation (-1)
828	        Vty.EvKey key mods
829	            | hasQueuedMessages && matchesEvent keymap EventNavigateDown (Vty.EvKey key mods) ->
830	                handleQueueNavigation 1
831	        Vty.EvKey key mods
832	            | hasQueuedMessages && matchesEvent keymap EventDeleteItem (Vty.EvKey key mods) ->
833	                handleDeleteSelectedMessage
834	        Vty.EvKey Vty.KUp _ -> vScrollBy (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) (-1)
835	        Vty.EvKey Vty.KDown _ -> vScrollBy (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) 1
836	        Vty.EvKey Vty.KLeft _ -> hScrollBy (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) (-1)
837	        Vty.EvKey Vty.KRight _ -> hScrollBy (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) 1
838	        Vty.EvKey Vty.KPageUp _ -> vScrollPage (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) Up
839	        Vty.EvKey Vty.KPageDown _ -> vScrollPage (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) Down
840	        _ -> pure ()
841	
842	-- | Handle session view scrolling.
843	handleSessionViewEvent :: Tracer IO Trace -> Vty.Event -> KeyMapping -> EventM N TuiState ()
844	handleSessionViewEvent _tracer ev keymap =
845	    case ev of
846	        Vty.EvKey key mods
847	            | matchesEvent keymap EventEnterTurnNavigation (Vty.EvKey key mods) -> do
848	                mSession <- getFocusedSession
849	                case mSession of
850	                    Just session | not (null session.turns) -> do

----
{-# LANGUAGE OverloadedRecordDot #-}
{-# LANGUAGE OverloadedStrings #-}

{- | Event handling for the TUI application.

This module handles all user input and application events for the TUI.
During migration to the OS model, tool operations use the RuntimeBridge
which synchronizes tools between the legacy Runtime and OS Core.
-}
module System.Agents.TUI.Event where

import Brick
import Brick.BChan (BChan, newBChan, readBChan, writeBChan)
import Brick.Focus (FocusRing, focusGetCurrent, focusNext, focusPrev, focusRing, focusSetCurrent)

    fileBrowserCursor,

 )

import qualified Brick.Widgets.List as List
import Control.Concurrent (forkIO, threadDelay)
import Control.Concurrent.Async (async, poll)
import Control.Concurrent.STM (STM, TVar, atomically, modifyTVar, readTVar, readTVarIO, writeTVar)
import Control.Lens (to, use, (%=), (.=), (^.), _Just)
import Control.Monad (filterM, void, when)
import Control.Monad.IO.Class (liftIO)
